waiting_for: Rally to EMA75/30000 zone for short entry with adequate R/R, or drop to EMA21 for potential long bounce – currently in no-man's-land between EMAs with neutral stochastic

long_assessment.reasoning: New bearish FVG above (29998.50-30005.00) is only 13.5 pts to top; final target 30000 after 5-pt buffer yields ~13.5 pts reward from current 29986.50. Even with a tight 10-pt stop R/R ≈ 1.35, but 10-pt stops are unrealistic for NQ volatility. A proper 30-40 pt stop gives R/R < 0.5. EMA21 at 29982 is 4 pts below – price would need to pull back to it for an EMA_BOUNCE long, but trend is down (EMA21 < EMA75) and stochastic neutral, so counter-trend long lacks confluence. No level break or momentum signal. Long setup invalid.

short_assessment.reasoning: Bullish FVG below (29950.25-29966.75) final target 29955.25 is 31.25 pts away. With a standard 40-pt stop R/R = 0.78; need ~24-pt stop for 1.3 R/R – too tight for breathing room. Better entry would be a rally to EMA75 (29993.74) or 30000 psych level: entry ~29994, reward ~38.5 pts, stop ~30000 (6 pts) still too tight, stop ~30010 (16 pts) gives R/R ~2.4 but 16 pts is marginal. Stochastic at 46 not overbought, so no momentum confirmation for short. EMA structure shows weak downtrend but price is between EMAs – no clear EMA_BOUNCE rejection yet. Waiting for price to tag resistance zone (EMA75/30000) before considering short.
